title: ImportModel
description: The model for an import operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the import operation.

uri.description: The URI from where the data is imported.

status.description:
The status of the operation.
Possible values: `Pending`, `InProgress`, `Failed`, `Completed`, or `Cancelled`.

createdAt.description: The start time of the import operation.

finishedAt.description: The end time of the import operation.

percentComplete.description: The progress made by the operation, as a percentage.

recordsImported.description: The number of records successfully imported.

error.description: The error message if the import process failed.
